Book The World of Ice & Fire (appendix)

Lyarra Stark was a noblewoman from House Stark during the reign of Kings Aegon V, Jaehaerys II and Aerys II Targaryen. She was a daughter of Rodrik Stark and Arya Flint, and was the younger sister of Branda Stark.[2]

Contents

  • 1 History
  • 2 Family
  • 3 Behind the Scenes
  • 4 References

History[ ]

Lyarra married her first cousin once removed, Rickard Stark, the Lord of Winterfell and Warden of the North. Together they had four children: Brandon, Eddard, Lyanna, and Benjen Stark.[2]

Behind the Scenes[ ]

When asked about the identity and fate of Eddard Stark's mother, George R. R. Martin once responded simply, "Lady Stark. She died."[3]
